channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree branch overhanging into the path, 6th May
item.description:
Outside Baylis on kingsmead road. Overhanging branches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Kingsmead Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches overhanging into pathway., 6th May
item.description:
On corner of kingsmead road village road. You can't miss is the tree branch is covering the path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Kingsmead Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Possible start of sinkhole, 6th May
item.description:
Towards the junction of Suffolk Parade and Suffolk Road. Close to shop ‘True Tone Music’.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Suffolk Parade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 6th May
item.description:
There is a problem with water logging at that exact place.

item.title: Drain cover broken leaving hazardous hole, 6th May
item.description:
At the edge of parking area pathway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Barrington Mews, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 6th May
item.description:
Hi, Two trees have been felled on Village Road GL510AE by the council/highway maintenance. Are there any plans to replace the two trees.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Completely Blocked Drain (See Photos), 6th May
item.description:
This blocked drain causes a massive amount of additional run off water to flow down Langton Grove Road. Endangering houses to flood risk and on Cudnall Street below. It looks like a blocked drain was reported over a year ago with apparently no action taken. Or it has been cleared and has filled again over the winter? I can't tell! It would be great if this can be fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 240, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6x6 paving slab orchard avenue, 6th May
item.description:
Out side number 11 orchard avenue Cheltenham my son tripped with his scooter and injured his elbow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Overgrown hogweed, 6th May
item.description:
Please see email below. This has become overgrown again and is pushing against and damaging our fence. It is also stopping us from using the gate. Please can you clear this as a matter if urgency, and also ensure it is maintained fpinf forward. We have had to report it several times i. The past.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 6th May
item.description:
4 way traffic lights 28 day please repair damaged wall on roundabout approx 3000x1000 mm damaged brick work and top edge stone. please see comments below . Stats required (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet
